topics.title: Database
topics.description:
 A database is an organized set of informa on that can be electronically stored and retrieved.  
 Databases are made to effec vely manage, store, and retrieve data. 
 Soware known as a database management system (DBMS) organizes and controls incoming
topics.content:
data and gives users or other programs the ability to edit or extract it. 
 My SQL, Microso Access, Oracle DB, SQL Server, and others are a few examples.  
 A query is an expression that asks a database table or group of tables for data or informa on.  
 SQL can be used to produce simple or sophis cated queries.  Database types include
